name: Hyperion Solutions Corporation
description: Hyperion Solutions Corporation was a leading provider of business performance management software. The company's solutions enabled businesses to translate strategies into plans, monitor execution, and analyze financial and operational results. Hyperion's product suite included applications for financial consolidation, planning, budgeting, forecasting, and business intelligence. In 2007, Hyperion Solutions Corporation was acquired by Oracle Corporation, and its products were integrated into Oracle's enterprise performance management portfolio.
